message: P48 implementation is blocked pending explicit user authorization.

p48Target.name: Paper Simulation Dry-run Result Artifact Golden Fixture Design
p48Target.description: Design golden fixture data structures that represent expected dry-run result artifacts for deterministic test verification.

authorizationRequired.phrase: YES design paper simulation dry-run result artifact golden fixture for P48
authorizationRequired.note: Send this exact phrase as a standalone message to unblock P48 implementation.

forbiddenActionsUntilAuthorized: Do NOT produce PnL / ROI / win-rate
